prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约48878名、47502名、53956名、175935名、77327名。2021–2023年位次稳定在4.8万–5.4万区间；2024年出现异常 断档跌至约17.6万名；2025年大幅回升至约77327名，但仍未恢复至2021–2023年水平，近两年波动剧烈；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为20人，2 024–2025年扩至26人；2026年计划仍为26人，与2025年持平，无扩招或缩招，对竞争格局无额外影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 内蒙古大学为211工程、国家双一流 建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第113–120名区间，2026年排名第114名，属于中后段211院校，综合实力在同类院校中处于中等水平；该校在抖音平台 热度排名第101位，评价为「一般」，综合热度约10.5万，曝光量处于中低水平；学校声誉文件中未见2021–2026年相关重大正面或负面舆情事件；投档异常数据中亦无该校记录， 整体报考关注度平稳。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年浙江省高考报名 总人数约40万人，较2025年约29.1万人大幅增加约37.6%，考生规模显著扩大，整体录取竞争加剧；内蒙古大学位于呼和 浩特市，距浙江省较远，地域偏好对浙江考生而言相对不利，可能在一定程度上削弱报考热度，部分抵消考生总数增加带来的竞争压力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约 77327名、2026年招生计划持平、浙江省考生总数大幅增加约37.6%以及地域偏远等多元因素：考生规模扩大推高整体竞争，但地域偏好不利和学校关注度一般形成对冲。预计2026 年最低录取位次在2025年基础上小幅后移，预测最低位次约78827名，区间78327–79327名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang Comprehensive category were approximately 48,878, 47,502, 53,956, 175,935, and 77,327 respectively. Rankings were stable in the 48,000–54,000 range from 2021 to 2023; in 2024, an abnormal drop occurred to about 176,000; in 2025, it rebounded significantly to about 77,327, but still not recovered to the 2021–2023 level, with severe fluctuations in the past two years. The enrollment plan for Zhejiang Comprehensive category was 20 students from 2021 to 2023, expanded to 26 students in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan remains 26 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having no additional impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Inner Mongolia University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable in the 113–120 range in recent years, ranking 114th in 2026, belonging to the mid-to-late tier of 211 institutions, with comprehensive strength at a medium level among similar schools. On Douyin platform, its popularity ranks 101st, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 105,000, and exposure at a medium-low level. No major positive or negative public opinion events from 2021 to 2026 were found in the school reputation documents; there are also no records of abnormal admission data for this school, indicating overall stable application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of applicants for the Zhejiang college entrance examination is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.6% compared to about 291,000 in 2025, with a notable expansion in the number of candidates, intensifying overall admission competition. Inner Mongolia University is located in Hohhot, far from Zhejiang Province, and geographical preference is relatively unfavorable for Zhejiang candidates, which may weaken application enthusiasm to some extent, partially offsetting the competitive pressure brought by the increase in total candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of about 77,327, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 37.6% in the total number of Zhejiang candidates, and factors such as remote geography: the expansion of candidate numbers pushes up overall competition, but unfavorable geographical preference and average school attention create a counterbalance. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 level, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 78,827, in the range of 78,327–79,327.
